untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by 36-month prior returns and forming a portfolio of losers. This requires cross-sectional ranking/sorting logic not available in point-in-time indicator operators. The formation period (36 months of historical data accumulation) and portfolio construction methodology cannot be expressed as simple left-operator-right conditions on individual price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: This contrarian strategy requires: (1) calculating each stock's 36-month cumulative return, (2) ranking all stocks by this metric, (3) selecting the bottom decile/quintile (losers), and (4) holding equal-weight for 24 months. Standard technical indicators cannot express this cross-sectional portfolio selection. The backtest engine would need custom portfolio ranking logic or a pre-screened watchlist to implement this signal.
